ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-01-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Avid Alavi appeared by zoom for Thomas Lucas.

The Court asked for status of Timothy Habert's estate. Ms. Alavi stated that they tried to get an update on Monday, that she contacted Melanie Morrow, that Ms. Morrow didn't have any information and that they were told to contact the Attorney who is providing assistance. Ms. Alavi also stated that they have attempted to contact the Attorney in Ohio, that there has been no response, that she thinks very little has been done, that Carolyn is elderly and not in good health, and that she thinks it would harm Carolyn and Gary to not get their distribution. The Court stated that any prejudice to Carolyn could have been addressed by filing of a different petition and that they could have done a petition for preliminary distribution. Ms. Alavi stated that they had a petition with an earlier hearing date and that it was only because Timothy passed away that they had to amend it. The court noted that the petition was filed one day after Timothy died, and stated that it understands the circumstances, but it is also sensitive Ms. Alavi's position that Court delay is hurting Carolyn and Gary. Ms. Alavi stated that the matter can be continued for three weeks and that she can continue to try and get a hold of the Ohio Attorney. The Court stated that it will treat Timothy's bequest as a reserve. The Amended First and Final Account and Report of Administrator, etc. is under submission. Status on distribution to Timothy Habert's estate is set for December 8, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status of the reserve is set for June 15, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-19-2019 Granted Per Written Order
